name: bandit.player_lit_fire_signal_wait_mcw
description: Player-lit fire bandit signal-response probe: start from the green visible-brazier/source-zone saved fd_fire proof, install mineral water plus an AUTO_DRINK support zone, prove the saved fire/water/zone footing, wait a bounded 30 in-game minutes through the real wait UI, require same-run live-signal/dispatch artifacts, then save and inspect turn delta plus persisted bandit live-world signal metadata. This does not prove roof/horde behavior.

steps.label: post_load_player_lit_fire_signal_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the captured green player-lit fire footing; this proves startup/load only, while later metadata proves saved fd_fire/water/AUTO_DRINK footing

steps.label: normal_map_before_player_lit_fire_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: startup did not land on normal map UI before the bounded signal wait; do not credit wait/signal proof from a stale or wrong screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: normal map UI is visible before any long-wait input is sent from the real player-lit fire footing

steps.label: audit_saved_player_lit_fire_target_before_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: captured signal-wait fixture no longer contains the real player-lit f_brazier + fd_fire target tile from the green ignition proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of the player still contains the real player-created f_brazier + fd_fire before the bandit signal wait

steps.label: audit_saved_mineral_water_support_before_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: mineral water support item is missing before bounded signal wait; do not let thirst/no-drink setup become the proof result
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata contains mineral water adjacent to the player as survivability support before the bounded wait

steps.label: audit_saved_auto_drink_zone_before_signal_wait
steps.required_name_contains: OpenClaw auto drink wait support zone
steps.abort_reason: AUTO_DRINK support zone is missing or does not cover player/mineral water before bounded signal wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved zone metadata contains an AUTO_DRINK support zone covering the player and adjacent mineral water before the bounded wait

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_player_lit_fire_signal_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before the bounded signal wait so a later guarded save can prove elapsed in-game time

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_player_lit_fire_bandit_signal
steps.abort_reason: bounded 30-minute wait was interrupted or left a prompt visible; screenshot/OCR artifacts classify the exact blocker before any response key is sent
steps.expected_visible_fact: the real wait UI is opened, Wait a while is chosen, 30 minutes is selected, and same-run artifacts must show live player-lit fire signal response rather than startup/load only
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted, the signal artifacts are absent, or elapsed time cannot be proven by the later saved turn delta, this packet is inconclusive/non-green. Do not type through prompts blindly.

steps.label: audit_player_lit_fire_signal_dispatch_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain the player-lit fire live-signal scan/maintenance/dispatch response lines after the bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains live smoke/fire signal scan, site match, and bandit dispatch response from the real player-created fire source

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_player_lit_signal_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the live-signal wait and before the guarded save/writeback

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_player_lit_signal_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: a save-and-quit prompt request is issued after the bounded signal wait; mtime and saved-turn metadata prove acceptance after confirmation
steps.failure_rule: If the subsequent uppercase-Y confirmation does not advance saved-player mtime, the save request row cannot be credited.

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_player_lit_signal_wait
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is trusted only if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y follows the recorded save prompt/request so the following mtime and saved metadata gates can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_player_lit_signal_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the post-signal save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-signal save, proving the following turn and bandit-live-world metadata read same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_player_lit_fire_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least 1500 turns after the bounded wait and guarded save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved player turn counter advanced by a bounded 30-minute-scale delta after the real wait UI path

steps.label: audit_saved_bandit_live_world_after_player_lit_signal_save
steps.abort_reason: saved dimension-data bandit_live_world metadata did not contain active bandit response state plus persisted known_recent_marks live_smoke signal after same-run save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved dimension-data contains a bandit_camp active response targeting the player plus persisted known_recent_marks live_smoke signal state from the real player-lit fire

evidence_contract.claim: real player-created source-zone fire can feed the live bandit signal path during a bounded wait, create a bandit response, and persist signal/active-state metadata after guarded save/writeback
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for player-lit fire signal response
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No signal-response credit if saved fd_fire footing, water/AUTO_DRINK support, bounded wait, same-run signal/dispatch artifact, save/writeback, turn delta, or saved bandit_live_world signal metadata is missing or non-green.
